allow:
Bash(# Kill old server
pkill -f "uvicorn app.main:app --port 8001" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1

# Restart
uvicorn app.main:app --port 8001 &
sleep 3

python -c "
from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.models.user import User
from app.models.activation import UserModelActivation
from app.utils.security import create_access_token

db = SessionLocal\(\)
user = db.query\(User\).filter\(User.username == 'chattest'\).first\(\)
if not user:
    from app.utils.security import hash_password
    user = User\(username='chattest', hashed_password=hash_password\('TestPass123!'\), balance=100.0, is_active=True, client_id=12345, client_uuid='test-uuid'\)
    db.add\(user\)
    db.commit\(\)
    db.refresh\(user\)
else:
    user.balance = 100.0
    db.commit\(\)

activation = db.query\(UserModelActivation\).filter\(UserModelActivation.user_id == user.id, UserModelActivation.model_id == 'qwen3.6-plus'\).first\(\)
if not activation:
    db.add\(UserModelActivation\(user_id=user.id, model_id='qwen3.6-plus', status='active'\)\)
    db.commit\(\)

token = create_access_token\({'sub': str\(user.id\)}\)
db.close\(\)

import httpx
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
r = httpx.post\('http://127.0.0.1:8001/api/v1/chat/completions', 
    json={'model': 'qwen3.6-plus', 'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hello'}], 'stream': True},
    headers=headers, timeout=30\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\('Content-Type:', r.headers.get\('content-type'\)\)
print\('Body:', r.text[:2000]\)
" 2>&1)
